expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add a notification center with persistent read state, unread badge, filtering, and clear-read behavior.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state to persist across sessions so that I do not lose read/unread context.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification records store read state",
        "Existing records default read state to unread",
        "Read state is retained after sign-out and next sign-in",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/db/migrations/*notification-read-state*",
        "src/db/schema/notifications.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Implement notification read-state update operations",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark individual notifications read or unread so that I can control what needs attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend operations support mark-read and mark-unread for a notification",
        "Only the notification owner can update its read state",
        "Updated read state is returned to clients",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/update-read-state.*",
        "src/api/notifications/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Implement notification list filtering and clear-read operation",
      "description": "As a user, I want read-state filtering and a clear-read action so that I can manage notification noise.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list query supports filters for all, unread, and read",
        "Clear-read operation deletes or archives only read notifications",
        "Unread notifications remain after clear-read operation",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/list-notifications.*",
        "src/server/notifications/clear-read.*",
        "src/api/notifications/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification center list surface",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge and a notification list panel so that I can quickly see pending notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "App header shows unread badge count",
        "Clicking notification entry point opens notification list",
        "List items visually indicate read versus unread state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/header-notification-badge.*",
        "src/components/notification-center-panel.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add notification item read and unread controls",
      "description": "As a user, I want controls on notification items to mark read or unread so that I can manage each item directly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each notification item includes mark-read and mark-unread controls as appropriate",
        "Using the control updates item state without page reload",
        "Unread badge count updates after state change",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notification-item.*",
        "src/hooks/use-notification-actions.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add read-state filters and clear-read control in notification center",
      "description": "As a user, I want read-state filters and a clear-read control in the notification center so that I can focus on relevant notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center includes filter options All, Unread, and Read",
        "Clear read notifications control is visible and actionable",
        "After clear-read action, list refreshes and shows remaining notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notification-filters.*",
        "src/components/clear-read-button.*",
        "src/components/notification-center-panel.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
expectations.evidence:

      "acceptanceCriteria": [

        "Using the control updates item state without page reload",
        "Unread badge count updates after state change",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
